product_highlights: Hi-Cap® — modified starch encapsulant for volatile and sensitive actives
Capsul® series — spray-dried starch microencapsulation for fragrance and flavor
Novation® — clean-label starch matrices for natural cosmetic applications
Hi-Maize® — resistant starch prebiotic carrier for microbiome-active formulations
notes: Ingredion is a global ingredient solutions company with a strong portfolio of starch-based encapsulation technologies widely used in personal care and cosmetics. Their Hi-Cap® and Capsul® modified starch systems provide cost-effective, natural-origin encapsulation for volatile actives, fragrances, and sensitive ingredients requiring protection from oxidation or evaporation. Ingredion's clean-label positioning and non-GMO options make them highly relevant for SKIN-TWIN formulation recommendations targeting natural and sustainable product lines.
